creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: dim
Date: Sat Aug 18 12:11:23 UTC 2018
New revision: 338014
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/base/338014

Log:

  r339999, resolve conflicts, and bump version numbers.

  PR:		230240,230355
